notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-384 — New auto-pilot exit: 🎯 Scale out at target. When a holding hits your take-profit, the bot can sell part (you pick the %), bank the gain, and let the rest run — stop lifts to break-even and it rides the 🪤 trailing stop. Turn it on in ⚖ My Rules → exits. Off by default on existing accounts; practice money only. Feedback via the ✉ link, top-left.
